summary: A 6-second silent text-card graphic from the '#12DaysofTips' series promoting TSA PreCheck enrollment for easier travel in the new year, over an animated snowflake/DHS-seal background. No audio and no music; a plain informational text promo, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: TODAY'S TIP: APPLY FOR TSA PRECHECK AND TRAVEL WITH EASE IN THE NEW YEAR; #12DaysofTips
